name: better-mcp-suite
description: Curated collection of better-* MCP servers for web search, memory, Notion, email, Telegram, Godot, and code review

plugins.name: wet-mcp
plugins.description: Web search, content extraction, and media download

plugins.name: mnemo-mcp
plugins.description: Persistent AI memory — store, search, and recall knowledge across sessions

plugins.name: better-notion-mcp
plugins.description: Comprehensive Notion API integration — 9 composite tools covering ~95% of Notion API surface

plugins.name: better-email-mcp
plugins.description: Email management via IMAP/SMTP — search, read, send, organize across multiple accounts

plugins.name: better-telegram-mcp
plugins.description: Telegram Bot API integration — messages, chats, media, contacts management

plugins.name: better-godot-mcp
plugins.description: Comprehensive Godot Engine integration — 18 tools for scenes, nodes, scripts, physics, UI, and more

plugins.name: better-code-review-graph
plugins.description: Persistent incremental knowledge graph for token-efficient, context-aware code reviews
